rows.label: tev060601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Pirapira about the bin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Pirapira if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Before city, Pirapira only have to hunt
around and catch vagabond ants and cetecegem
beetles in order to enjoy tasty meal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0002
rows.name:
But here in city, food cost money—and
human friends always get shouty if
Pirapira try to eat flowers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Only safe haven is this bin. If
Pirapira wait here, nice friends
deliver many fine things to eat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Box is food heaven. Except for
sometimes when tummy start to hurt
really bad and then...terrible things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ugh. Pirapira want to
eat real food one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Pirapira was so excited about friendship treaty.
Pirapira heard that friends could come to NLA and
gorge selves on acres of delicious food...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0009
rows.name:
But no one told Pirapira
that food costs money! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Pirapira blew entire savings on
Miralife Cards right after moving
here and went flat broke. *ruuuumble*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now Pirapira going to die ironic death
with amazing Miralife Cards in hand but
no food in stomach. Meeeeeeeh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Pirapira about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Did friend know this bin
is called GARBAGE bin?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Friend KNEW?! Why did friend not say
something and stop Pirapira from engaging
in stomach-turning bin binge?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Also, human friends should be
ashamed for throwing out food
that can still be eaten when...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Wait! Pirapira could put food from
bin into cans and sell it to caravans
for big money! It genius![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Nopon customer not need to know finer details like
where food come from or what it actually made of.
All is local! Organic! Farm to bin to table![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Pirapira decided to sell off less-rare
Miralife Cards and use money to buy
first proper meal in long time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now that Pirapira not hunched over in digestive
agony, Pirapira can go back to being merchant
and save money for cards AND food![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Pirapira about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thanks to generosity of friend, Pirapira
able to eat something good for once and
say good-bye to gastrointestinal hell.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0022
rows.name:
...What? Pirapira should also
say good-bye to Miralife Card
addiction? Mo! Never![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Pirapira going to make it as
merchant and earn enough to buy
food AND cards! Friend just watch![ST:wait ]
